title: OK Additions
description: Small but useful additions. Spray Cans, Tape Measure, Jump Pads, Tomahawks, Flashbangs, Binoculars, Instruments, etc.
body:
**Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib).**

OK Additions adds a variety of small, useful weapons, tools, blocks, and consumables to the game. This includes but is not limited to:

### Tools
- Spray Can: Paint the world, using particles with a limited lifetime. Dyeable (changes paint color).
- Tape Measure: Measure the distance between two blocks, along with some extra data.
- Binoculars: Better than vanilla Spyglasses, with a zoom in/out function.
- Spotter: Spawn different types of markers, including your offhand item. Dyeable (changes arrow and hand color).
![An image of modded Minecraft tools, divided into four corners. Top-left corner depicts a Spray can, with two examples, a yellow burning Smiley face, and a falling Grass block. Top-right corner depicts a Tape Measure, with two examples, those being a 3D diagonal line, and a 2D uneven line. Bottom-left depicts some Binoculars, zooming in on herd of Cows. Bottom-right depicts the "Spotter" item, along with its different Marker modes (Look, Danger, Mine, and two Offhand examples)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ef6b121fe431b421d76fb3427b9ea8dbf59af31_0.webp)

### Weapons
- Tomahawks: Hybrid weapons, used at long range or melee range. Available in all Tiers.
- Boleadoras: Hinder the movement of the entity hit. Immobilization scales with Tier.
- Flashbang: Temporarily blind other players.
- Potion Ballista: Shoots any Potion type. Splash and Lingering keep their behavior, Normal potions are directly ingested by the entity hit.
![An image of modded Minecraft tools, divided into four corners. Top-left corner depicts a Tomahawk being thrown at a zombie. Top-right depicts a Boleadora/Bola being thrown at a Vindicator and hindering its movement. Bottom-left depicts a Flashbang and its effect. Bottom-right depicts a "Potion Ballista" being loaded with a Poison II potion.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7428188916c3de3fe3b76d35f9e11f9edfb8aad_0.webp)

### Blocks
- Jump Pads: Directionally impulses entities. Available in 3 Tiers.
- Shelf (Not the vanilla ones!): Showcase up to 4 blocks.

### Consumable Items
- Water Balloon: Extinguishes fires.
- Tool Lubricant: Temporarily Grants Haste II.
- Ice Pack: Extinguishes the player if on fire, and grants Fire Resistance.
- Paper Plane: Does nothing. Just flies.

### Configuration/Customization
Most of the features of the mod have relevant Server settings to tweak/nerf/buff them.
![Image of the Mod's configuration, as of version 1.0. This includes tools, weapon, consumable item, and block configuration, such as Flashbang's duration, Spray paint's lifetime, Lasso's ability to hook players or not, Energy Drink's haste duration, and many more.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef4a8096546f2cece381fb21089d1d6cfe790cd4.png)
